title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!
